TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Hikasiki_go, title = Hikasiki_go, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hikasiki_go} }

S.FORM: Hikasiki go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 215.12 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 111.01 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 0 km²), 8,802 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 3,787 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,584 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 52%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Hikasiki go ays psgayun 7 ru 10 alang. 10 alang hani ga, Sena' , Asiroay , Howak , Pa'anifong , Kalifangar , 'Etolan , Alapawan , Cilafinan , Fafokod , Ma'olaway .

Hikasiki go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 215.12 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 111.01 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 0 km²), 8,802 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 3,787 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,584 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 52%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Hikasiki go ays psgayun 7 ru 10 alang. 10 alang hani ga, Sena' , Asiroay , Howak , Pa'anifong , Kalifangar , 'Etolan , Alapawan , Cilafinan , Fafokod , Ma'olaway .
S.PHON: ħikas~ɕiki ɣo mki s~ɕku taituŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa * km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. s~ɕinpŋan s~ɕeħu s~ɕʔuli s~ɕku s~ɕaħuj ɣo. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu ħikas~ɕiki ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, s~ɕenaʔ , as~ɕiroaj , ħowak , paʔani*oŋ , kali*aŋar , ʔetolan , alapawan , ʦ~ʨila*inan , *a*oko* , maʔolawaj .
